title: Tapirira colebrookeana
intro: Tapirira colebrookeana, also known as Indian bay tree, is a deciduous tree native to India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. The health benefits of Tapirira colebrookeana include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in the treatment of various skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Tapirira colebrookeana include tea, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions.
